name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives or workarounds have you considered?

## Privacy and Security Considerations

Does this change affect API keys, private browsing, persistence, page content, remote requests, or user data?

## Agent Help

If an AI coding agent helped shape this proposal, feel free to summarize the useful context. Please omit private prompts, transcripts, secrets, local paths, and private URLs.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, references, or implementation notes if useful.
